entity.label: Matthan
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Eleazar, and father of Jacob, who was the father of Joseph, the husband of the Virgin Mary (Matt. 1:15).

nodes.label: Matthan
nodes.description: The son of Eleazar, and father of Jacob, who was the father of Joseph, the husband of the Virgin Mary (Matt. 1:15).

verses.text: And Eliud begat Eleazar; and Eleazar begat Matthan; and Matthan begat Jacob;
